title: FPV drones enter Iran vs US-Israel war: All about the low-cost ‘kamikaze’ weapons
summary_full: The ongoing war between the United States, Israel, and Iran highlights the growing role of inexpensive drones. First-person-view (FPV) drones, originally for recreation, are now battlefield weapons. These agile drones offer precise strikes at a low cost, challenging expensive air defense systems. Their widespread use signals a shift in modern warfare tactics.
